data.title: Holiday on 26th January
data.message: The institute will remain closed on 26th January on account of Republic Day.

data.title: Mid-Term Exam Schedule
data.message: Mid-term examinations will commence from 10th March. See notice board for detailed timetable.

data.title: Hostel Fee Reminder
data.message: All hostel students are requested to pay the hostel fees by 31st January to avoid late fine.

data.title: Data Structures Lab Cancelled
data.message: The Data Structures lab scheduled for 5th February is cancelled due to faculty meeting.

data.title: Library Timings Extended
data.message: Library will remain open till 10 PM during exam days.
